name: qlogicae-cor1
author: Vaughn Cedric L. Araneta
description: The core library for QLogicae framework integrations via JavaScript/TypeScript

scripts.clean: bun run clean:build && bun run clean:reports
scripts.build: bun run clean:build && bun run format && bun run lint && bun run transpile && bun run bundle && bun run build:post
scripts.build:post: cp package.json ./.outputs/build && cp README.md ./.outputs/build && cp -r ./assets ./.outputs/build && cp -r ./licenses ./.outputs/build
scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:benchmark
scripts.workflow:test: bun run build && bun run test
scripts.workflow:test:unit: bun run build && bun run test:unit
scripts.workflow:test:benchmark: bun run build && bun run test:benchmark
scripts.workflow:deploy:commit: git add . && git commit -m 'deployment preparation' || true
scripts.workflow:deploy:major: bun run workflow:deploy:pre && npm version major && bun run workflow:deploy:commit && bun run workflow:deploy:post
scripts.workflow:deploy:minor: bun run workflow:deploy:pre && npm version minor && bun run workflow:deploy:commit && bun run workflow:deploy:post
scripts.workflow:deploy:patch: bun run workflow:deploy:pre && npm version patch && bun run workflow:deploy:commit && bun run workflow:deploy:post
scripts.workflow:deploy:standalone: bun run workflow:deploy:pre && bun run workflow:deploy:commit && bun run workflow:deploy:post
scripts.workflow:deploy:post: (bun publish ./outputs/build/ && git push) || (bun run login && bun publish ./outputs/build/ && git push)
